_meta.description: Grant pipeline + active applications + post-award deliverable tracking. Drives /grants reporting and the operator's deadline calendar. Restricted-fund accounting hooks into financials.json.

mustHave: Aligns with stated mission (privacy, family infrastructure, lived-experience advocacy)
Permits open-source publication of funded artifacts
Does not require operator to disclose protected health information
Does not require client/beneficiary tracking incompatible with privacy commitments
Reporting burden < 10% of grant value in operator-time
shouldHave: Capacity-building component (general operating, not just project)
Funder values aligned with edge-only / open-source ethos
automaticDecline: Requires moving data to cloud-vendor controlled by funder
Requires demographic data collection beyond what mission requires

candidateFunders.name: Mozilla Foundation — MIECO / Open Source Support
Sloan Foundation — Better Software for Science
Patrick J. McGovern Foundation — AI for Good
Cloud-vendor nonprofit credits (Cloudflare Project Galileo, Pages free tier)
candidateFunders.note: Already on free tier; formal Galileo enrollment available post-determination

trackerCreatedFor: interim reports (with draft deadlines internal to funder deadlines)
final report (90 days before grant period end)
postAwardDiscipline.burnRateAlerts: monthly check; flag if spend deviates >15% from plan
postAwardDiscipline.scopeChangeProtocol: any deviation from funded scope > $1000 or > 10% of budget requires documented funder approval

fundingDeclines.policy: We document and publish (anonymized if required by funder) all funding declined for ethical reasons. Builds peer-organization knowledge base.

donorAdvisedFundsAndIntermediaries.policy: Accept gifts via DAF without question; the underlying donor's identity may not be known to us, which is acceptable.
donorAdvisedFundsAndIntermediaries.exception: If we have specific knowledge of misalignment with named DAF advisor, may decline.
